confidence: Medium for source traceability; low for successful implementation from this story alone.

notes: Article I CLI First requires backend/CLI-operable capability before UI emphasis.
Article II respected: PO validation only; QA Results not populated as QA verdict.
Article III enforced: story remains Draft until readiness blockers are fixed.
Article IV enforced: validation used existing source artifacts only.
Article V gates were run and passed; story remains blocked for readiness, not code quality.

critical_issues.finding: quality_gate is @qa, but validate-next-story allows @architect, @dev, or @pm as quality_gate values.
critical_issues.impact: Story cannot pass executor assignment validation.

critical_issues.finding: Dev Notes cite external documents instead of pulling enough implementation context into the story.
critical_issues.impact: Dev agent must read external specs, violating the story template instruction.

critical_issues.finding: Story combines UI, data model, API, workers, SSE, chat, export, Arva, Portal Bridge, and TASK-MK01 through TASK-MK20.
critical_issues.impact: Tasks are too large to track and verify as one implementation-ready increment.

critical_issues.finding: AC2 requires 16 entities from TASKS_MKT while the SPEC sprint 1 database section defines 4 core tables.
Expected production paths include apps/modules/mkt and backend/api/mkt, but current repo structure shows apps/portal, packages/*, and no root backend directory.

should_fix: Split grouped tasks into concrete subtasks with file paths, dependencies, and AC mapping.
Bring security, RLS, upload validation, and multi-tenant constraints into Dev Notes.
Clarify CLI/backend-first sequence before UI work.
Specify actual test file locations and commands.

gates.npm_test: passed: turbo test, 9/9 tasks successful, cached; portal suite 15 files/41 tests passed
